technicalSection.title: Designed for practical JSON workflows
technicalSection.description: JSON Formatter follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Runs entirely in the browser with no server dependency.
Supports formatting, minification, and validation workflows.
Responsive experience across desktop and mobile devices.
